content.verdict: Fusion Maia Da Nang operates on a concept unique in Vietnam: daily spa treatments are included in the room rate, making it an all-spa-inclusive resort that builds wellness directly into the honeymoon from the first day. Eighty-seven pool villas on My Khe Beach — Da Nang's most celebrated stretch of sand — ensure every couple has their own private outdoor space. The concept is genuinely romantic: honeymooners who want to spend every afternoon in the spa can do so without the spa bill adding up.
content.best_room: The Beach Pool Villas are the premier choice — private pools oriented toward the South China Sea, with immediate beach access through the villa garden gate. The Garden Pool Villas offer more tropical privacy within the resort for couples who prefer shade and seclusion over the sea view. All 87 villas include a private pool; the all-spa-inclusive concept applies equally to every room category, making the lower room tiers genuinely excellent value.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & First Spa Inclusion
itinerary_7_nights.description: Da Nang Airport to Fusion Maia is 15 minutes. Check into your pool villa and immediately claim your first included spa treatment: the resort's daily inclusion means you can begin relaxing before your bags are unpacked. My Khe Beach is directly outside — 8km of clean white sand with the ocean warm and swimmable year-round.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Hoi An Day Trip
itinerary_7_nights.description: Hoi An's UNESCO Ancient Town is 30 minutes south — take the resort's shuttle or hire a driver. Morning tailoring appointment, afternoon wandering the lantern-lit lanes, and lunch at the Cargo Club overlooking the Thu Bon River. Return for an evening spa treatment: two daily sessions included means total freedom.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Fusion Spa Immersion Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: A full day devoted to the all-spa-inclusive concept. Morning treatment: a Vietnamese traditional massage using lemongrass-heated oils. A pool villa afternoon of swimming and reading. Evening treatment: a rejuvenating facial using Vietnamese botanical ingredients. No bills to sign, no supplements to calculate — this is the Fusion difference.

itinerary_7_nights.title: My Khe Beach & Water Sports
itinerary_7_nights.description: A day on My Khe Beach — rented surfboards (the beach has learnable waves for beginners), kayaks, and the long, flat stretches ideal for jogging. The resort's beach club provides sunbeds, cold towels, and fresh coconuts. Afternoon sunset swimming before the third consecutive evening of included treatments.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Marble Mountains & Ba Na Hills
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning at the Marble Mountains — Buddhist cave sanctuaries in five limestone peaks overlooking Da Nang. Afternoon at Ba Na Hills (optional): the French Village with its famous Golden Bridge held aloft by giant stone hands has become an unlikely icon. Return for the spa inclusion and a private dinner at the resort's beachside restaurant.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Yoga & Sunrise Beach
itinerary_7_nights.description: Pre-dawn yoga on the beach platform at 6am — a regular Fusion Maia offering as part of the included wellness programme. Spend the morning walking the full length of My Khe Beach in both directions. An afternoon cooking class at the resort's kitchen teaches Vietnamese summer rolls, pho stock, and banh mi construction.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Final Spa & Pool Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Last day: claim the final included treatments before checking out — end as you began, with spa included. Final pool morning, final South China Sea swim. Transfer to Da Nang Airport, wellness reserves thoroughly replenished.

caveats: The all-spa-inclusive concept covers two 50-minute treatments per day per person — premium treatments and spa retail are at additional cost.
My Khe Beach is a public beach — the resort has a beach club section but the beach itself is shared with other hotels and local visitors.
Da Nang has significant development and the resort is in an urban beach strip rather than a secluded cove; couples seeking total seclusion should consider Amanoi or Six Senses.

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Fusion Maia is excellent for honeymooners who love spa and wellness — the all-inclusive spa concept removes the constant calculation of what treatments to book and how much they'll cost, allowing total relaxation. The pool villas create private romantic spaces and the beach is excellent. For couples who plan to use the spa every day, this delivers extraordinary value.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: February through August offers the best weather for My Khe Beach. March to May is the sweet spot — warm, dry, and uncrowded. July and August are hot and sunny. Da Nang's rainy season runs October through December; the spa concept means weather doesn't significantly impact the resort experience.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: Beach Pool Villas book out 3 to 5 months ahead for peak season. The resort's unique concept generates strong repeat demand. Mention your honeymoon for complimentary room decorations and a welcome romantic package.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: No — Fusion Maia is open to families. The pool villa configuration means each family or couple is effectively self-contained. For couples, the spa inclusion concept is particularly well-suited to undisturbed romantic relaxation.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: Beach Pool Villas are the best honeymoon choice — private pools facing the sea and immediate beach access. Garden Pool Villas provide more shaded privacy within the resort for couples who prefer to be less exposed to the beach front. Both categories include the all-spa-inclusive benefit.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: Da Nang International Airport (DAD) is 15 minutes from Fusion Maia by taxi or resort transfer. International connections arrive from Singapore, Bangkok, Kuala Lumpur, Seoul, and Tokyo. From Europe and North America, connections via Singapore or Bangkok are standard.
